raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tas Kehninsch
Dahwids schahs Leetas dsirdeja/
tad apschaitahs wiꞥſch tohti. Bet
Absaloms ne runnoja ar Amnonu/
neds taunn neds labbu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo Absaloms eenihdeja
Amnonu par to/ ka wiꞥſch Tah-
maru wiꞥſna Mahfu bij ap-
finehjts.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pehz tahdeem diwi
Gaddeen bija Absalomain Aw-
ju-ẜirpeji Baäl Azorâ/ kas semm
Cewräima irr. Un Absaloms ai-
zinaja wiſſus Kehnixa Behrnus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Absaloms nahze pee ta
Kehnixa / un fazzija: Rangi jel-
le/ nu irr tawain Kalpam Aw-
ju-ẜirpeji/ laid / luhdsams / tas
Kehninsch ar faweem Kalpeim pee
fawa Kalpa nahk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Kehninsch fazzija
us Absalonn: Ne mans Dehls/
lai mehs ne eetam wiſſi/ ka mehs
tew Bruhtumu ne padarram.
Un wiꞥſch gann luhdse to/ bet tas
ne gribbeja eet/ bet fwehtija to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Absaloms:
Ja tu ne gribbi / tad laid / luh-
dsams / mans Brahlis Amnons
ar muuns eet/ bet tas Kehninsch
fazzija us to : Kapehz tam bij
lihds eet ?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu Absaloms wehl
wairak luhdse / tad laide wiꞥſch
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Absaloms pawehlej
faweem Puſcheem / un fazzija
Peerangajt jelle / kad Amnonu
Sir̄s preeziga buhs no Wiḫna
un es us juuns fazzifchu: Kauje
Amnonu/ tad nokaujeet wiꞥſnu
ne bihsteetes / jo es efuu jum
to pawehlejs / nemmeetees dro-
sch Sir̄di/ un turraſtees stipr
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Absaloma Puſchi da-
rija Amnonam/ ka Absaloms b-
pawehlejs. Tad zehlehs wiſ-
Kehnixa Behrni/ un jahje ikkatr
us fawn Sirg-Ehseli/ un behds
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee us Zeltu bija-
tad nahze ta Slawa pee Da-
wida/ un turktua fazzihfs: Ab-
saloms irr wiſſus Kehnixa Beh-
nus kawis/ ka ne weens no tee-
atlizzis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlehs tas Kehninsch
un faplohfija fawas Drehbes
un nomettehs pee Semmes /
wiſſi wiſna Kalpi stahweja a-
faplohfitahm Drehbehn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet Jonadabs / Sim-
jus Dahwida Brahka Dehls a-
bildeja / un fazzija: Ne dohm-
mans Kungs/ ka wiſſi Jaune-
ta Kehnixa Dehli nokanti irr-
bet Amnons ween irr nomirrie
Jo Absaloms irr to apnehme-
no tahs Deenas/ kad wiꞥſch wiſ-
na Mahfu Tahmaru apfinehje
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un nu laid mans Kung-
tas Kehninsch scho Leetu ta pe-
Sir̄s ne nemm / dohmada-
wiſſus Kehnixa Behrnus effa-
nomi
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
